form.formComment: Solid performance to win by half a length at Grafton over 450m (25.20) beating Living Legend in Maiden on April 5. Deserved winner last time after finishing in the money two on end prior to that. Can make it two on the trot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by half a length at Grafton over 450m (25.20) beating Living Legend in Maiden on April 5. Deserved winner last time after finishing in the money two on end prior to that. Can make it two on the trot.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Inland Mark at this track last start over 457m (26.29). Has to be respected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when third behind Inland Mark at this track last start over 457m (26.29). Has to be respected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Severely checked and fell entering the turn out of the back straight.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 390m (22.08) beating Aston Catch in Maiden on April 10. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 390m (22.08) beating Aston Catch in Maiden on April 10. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on March 28 over 457m at this track behind Hara's Neo beaten 6 lengths (25.94) in a OPEN. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th on March 28 over 457m at this track behind Hara's Neo beaten 6 lengths (25.94) in a OPEN. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

form.formComment: Returns from a eight months break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed at big odds over 350m at Q Straight. This will test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a eight months break and only other fresh up run was on debut when placed at big odds over 350m at Q Straight. This will test.

form.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished last on March 29 over 407m at Rockhampton behind Blazing Early beaten 15 lengths (24.77) in a Grade 6. Hard to recommend this time.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the finishing post gave ground.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (25.66) over 457m at this track. Wide draw here. Worth including.

formComments.comment: Finished second last start (25.66) over 457m at this track. Wide draw here. Worth including.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th on April 5 over 520m at Q Parklands behind Bourbon And Coke beaten 13 lengths (30.85) in a Maiden. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.
